workiqQueriesRun: Give me a comprehensive analysis of ALL my M365 activity from the past 7 days across email, meetings, Teams chats, and documents. For each source, list: the most frequent/recurring activities, estimated time spent, key participants (by role not name), and any repeating patterns or workflows. Include specific examples of recurring email types, meeting types, chat topics, and document types. Also identify cross-source workflows. Be thorough - I need at least 15 distinct activity patterns.

signals.title: Azure DevOps Notification Triage
signals.rawExcerpt: New Epics / Features / Requirements / Tasks for evals, coverage, jailing, IcM, and tooling arrive continuously. Pattern: skim, decide relevance, mentally map to ownership.

signals.title: Security & DLP Compliance Remediation
signals.rawExcerpt: Repeated Action Required: File Blocked alerts on files you modified. Pattern: receive, open file, sanitize, re-save. Examples: credentials, cert key detections.

signals.title: EvalCon Coordination & Leadership Nudges
signals.rawExcerpt: Forwarded announcements + deadline pressure + positioning guidance. Pattern: email triggers Teams follow-up. Example: EvalCon April 2 announcement.

signals.title: File-Share Review Notifications
signals.rawExcerpt: Others sharing evaluation docs for edit/review. Example: Response quality evaluations from the ESS product team.

signals.title: External Administrative Context Switches
signals.rawExcerpt: Non-work but time-consuming context switches (e.g., degree certification).

signals.title: Full-Day Workshop (Camp AIR)
signals.rawExcerpt: Long blocks (8h+), mix of plenary + breakouts. Example: CAPE Camp AIR (single event spanning the day).

signals.title: Standing Team / V-Team Weekly Sync
signals.rawExcerpt: Weekly cadence, large attendance. Example: Project Crucible v-Team.

signals.title: Customer / Partner Eval Deep Dive
signals.rawExcerpt: Agenda pattern: use-cases, screen share issues, eval tooling deep dive. Example described in Teams planning chat.

signals.title: 1:1 and Small-Group Design Reviews
signals.rawExcerpt: Process gaps, eval-driven development sequencing. Example: deck review with manager.

signals.title: EvalCon Planning & Positioning Thread
signals.rawExcerpt: Email escalation leads to Teams tasking (identify topics, drive v-team). Example thread with manager + peer PMs.

signals.title: Eval Tooling Technical Q&A
signals.rawExcerpt: Pattern: technical question, SME responses, link to docs/incidents. Examples: tool-call accuracy, citations, IcM escalation.

signals.title: ADO Triage & Customer-Ask Deduplication
signals.rawExcerpt: Is this a duplicate? leads to decision leads to work item update. Examples in Eval-DRI channel.

signals.title: Camp AIR Logistics & Artifact Sharing
signals.rawExcerpt: Links to SharePoint folders, decks, Loop pages, prototypes. Examples: CAPE Camp AIR document links.

signals.title: Agent Architecture & Cross-Org Strategy Discussion
signals.rawExcerpt: Vision-level discussions (A365, non-M365 agents, observability). Example: A365 Cross-Org Collab.

signals.title: Team Watercooler & Social Threads
signals.rawExcerpt: Low cognitive load but frequent pings (team morale). Example: BAT watercooler.

signals.title: Skill Framework & Automation Artifact Authoring
signals.rawExcerpt: skill-detector, Skilluminator, SKILL.md packages. Examples: skill-detector ZIPs, dashboard.html.

signals.title: Cycle Dashboard Creation & Analytical Outputs
signals.rawExcerpt: Cycle dashboards summarizing M365 activity patterns. Example: Skilluminator Cycle 3 dashboard.

signals.title: Agent Runtime & Dev Artifact Management
signals.rawExcerpt: Databases, logs, config files (agent.db, .claude.json). Examples: agent state files.

signals.title: Dev Environment Setup & Shell Scripting
signals.rawExcerpt: Devbox setup, shell snapshots. Example: setup-devbox.sh.

signals.title: Collaborative Docs Shared via Teams (Loop & Decks)
signals.rawExcerpt: Loop pages, decks, ZIP prototypes. Examples: Loop page shared in chat.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Email to Teams to Document (EvalCon Loop)
signals.rawExcerpt: Email announcement leads to Teams planning leads to draft content/decks. Evidence: EvalCon email + Teams thread + shared artifacts.

signals.title: Cross-Source: ADO Notification to Teams Triage to ADO Update
signals.rawExcerpt: System email leads to Teams discussion leads to decision on duplication/ownership. Evidence: ADO emails + Eval-DRI threads.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Meeting to Teams Follow-ups to Document Updates
signals.rawExcerpt: Camp AIR sessions lead to chat links lead to updated SharePoint artifacts. Evidence: Camp AIR meeting + Teams logistics threads.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Security Alert to File Edit to Compliance Resolution
signals.rawExcerpt: Purview email leads to OneDrive edit leads to unblock. Evidence: repeated DLP alerts.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Customer Ask to Eval Deep Dive Meeting to Tooling Guidance
signals.rawExcerpt: Chat planning leads to meeting leads to shared docs/links. Evidence: customer prep chat + eval tooling threads.
